assertions.expectation: Checks for deprecated API usage that may have changed behavior in 1.30
assertions.reason: Response includes specific commands to check for deprecated API calls using kubectl metrics and GKE recommender insights

assertions.expectation: Recommends checking admission webhooks — they may be rejecting or slowing down requests on the new version
assertions.reason: Response has dedicated section on admission webhook compatibility with commands to check configurations and provides mitigation steps

assertions.expectation: Advises checking if resource requests/limits need adjusting for any system components that changed
assertions.reason: Response includes checking resource usage of system components with 'kubectl top pods -n kube-system' and mentions components may need more resources

assertions.expectation: Suggests examining kube-system pods for any that are crashlooping or restarting
assertions.reason: Response explicitly includes commands to check kube-system pods and look for crashlooping or restarting components

assertions.expectation: Includes commands to check API server metrics and latency (kubectl get --raw /metrics)
assertions.reason: Response includes 'kubectl get --raw /metrics | grep apiserver_request_total | grep deprecated' command

assertions.expectation: Recommends checking if NetworkPolicy or service mesh components need updating for the new version
assertions.reason: Response has dedicated section on service mesh compatibility with specific commands for Istio/ASM and mentions updating service mesh control plane

assertions.expectation: Advises reviewing pod events for scheduling delays or readiness probe failures
assertions.reason: Response includes multiple commands to check events including 'kubectl get events' for system components and HPA scaling events

assertions.expectation: Mentions checking if HPA or VPA are behaving differently on the new version
assertions.reason: Response has specific section on HPA/VPA behavior changes with commands to check HPA status and scaling events
